allow: Bash(curl -s 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/imagen-3.0-generate-002:predict?key=AIzaSyAywdmRrSro0oVhASG_6ra-c7tl-OPzNys' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"instances":[{"prompt":"Aerial view of a bright amusement park, roller coasters, ferris wheel, blue sky, cinematic lighting, photorealistic"}],"parameters":{"sampleCount":1}}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('models',[]\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in models if 'image' in m['name'].lower\(\) or 'imagen' in m['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('error',{}\).get\('message','OK - checking for image...'\)[:300] if 'error' in d else 'SUCCESS'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); e=d.get\('error',{}\); print\(e.get\('code'\), e.get\('message','OK'\)[:200] if 'error' in d else 'SUCCESS'\)")
